name: Lexar Media, Inc.
description: Lexar is a prominent global brand specializing in high-performance flash memory solutions, including memory cards, USB flash drives, solid-state drives (SSDs), and card readers. Originally founded in the United States and formerly a subsidiary of Micron Technology, the brand is now owned by the Shenzhen-based company Longsys. Lexar is widely recognized for its innovation in digital storage, providing reliable and professional-grade memory products for photographers, videographers, and tech enthusiasts worldwide. The company continues to maintain a strong international presence, delivering advanced storage technology to meet the evolving demands of modern digital content creation and data management.
